name: Roy Orbison
abstract: Roy Kelton Orbison (April 23, 1936 – December 6, 1988) was an American singer, songwriter and guitarist known for his distinctive and powerful voice, complex song structures, and dark, emotional ballads. Orbison's most successful periods were in the early 1960s and the late 1980s.

about_quotes.speaker: Artie Shaw
about_quotes.evidence: I’ll read books, and they’ll say Roy Orbison was on or so-and-so was on and he said and his words said. Nothing to do with music, but they call it music. I never could understand it.
about_quotes.doc_title: Artie Shaw — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
